name: Elemental Channeling - Rime Surge
description: Creatures of your choice within 30 feet make a Constitution save. On a failure, a creature takes 2d10 + your cleric level cold damage and its speed is halved until the end of your next turn; on a success it takes half damage and is not slowed. A 10-foot-radius area centered on you becomes slick ice and counts as difficult terrain until the end of your next turn.
